Off Calendar Jan-12-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MILLAR & ASSOCIATES APLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO CCP 425.16, AND FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES.
APPEARANCES: Constantin V. Roboostoff, Esq. of Roboostoff & Kalkin 732-0282 for pltf & opposing party; James M. Millar, Esq. of Millar & Associates APLC 981-8100 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. In addition, the Court denied plaintiff's request for attorney fees. Plaintiff to submit proposed form of order. (302/PHA/VC) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
